violations.description: S3 bucket should not allow public read access
violations.recommendation: Set acl to 'private' or use bucket policies with restricted access

violations.description: S3 bucket should have encryption enabled
violations.recommendation: Enable AES-256 or AWS-KMS encryption for data at rest
